title: PMWU-RE
description: PMWU-RE (Radar Extras) adds various changes to the PMW radar, including support for color-tables, and adding Correlation Coefficient and Echo Tops, and a Wall-Mounted Radar!
body:
# Introduction
PMWU-RE (Radar Extras) adds various changes to the PMW radar, including support for color-tables, and adding Correlation Coefficient and Echo Tops!

# Color-Tables
Thank you to Ben Mitchell at https://www.wxtools.org/ for allowing me to use his published color-tables for this mod.

Reflectivity Options:
* Ben Mitchell
* COD
* Radar Omega
* Radar Scope

Velocity Options:
* Alpha
* MacDonald Emmerson
* SamBV
* SRRadarLoops

# Correlation Coefficient
Correlation Coefficient (CC) measures how uniform particles in the air are, typically used to distinguish between rain, snow, hail, and debris. This mod adds full CC support that uses real data/debris particles picked up by tornadoes.

# Echo Tops
Echo Tops (ET) is a radar-derived product mapping the highest altitude (in feet) where precipitation reaches a specific reflectivity threshold. This mod adds full support for ET based on thunderstorm stage + energy.

# Wall Radar

This mod adds a Wall-Mounted Radar diplsay into the game!

# Commands (OP usage)
/pmwure ccset <block> <weight>(light,medium,heavy,very_heavy) - Set the CC weight of a block\
/pmwure ccget <block> - Get the CC weight of a block.\
/pmwure ccreset - Reset all CC weights to default.\
/pmwure cclist  - View CC weight overrides.

# Requirements
- ProtoManly's Weather

# Support
Support for all PMWU mods are available within the [PMWU Support Discord](https://discord.gg/UmuhrS7vkU) server.

# Extra
This mod is apart of the PMWU modline, which was created to add multiple addon mods to [ProtoManly's Weather](https://modrinth.com/mod/protomanlys-weather). All PMWU mods are compatible with each other, but they have not been tested for compatability with other PMW sidemods.

This mod has been vigorously tested, but bugs may still appear. If you encounter a bug, please submit it to the [PMWU Support Discord](https://discord.gg/UmuhrS7vkU) server in a ticket.
